rules.name: pricing
rules.body_template:
Hi {sender_name},

Thanks for reaching out about pricing. We can absolutely help with that.

If you share a few details about your needs, I can send over the most relevant options and next steps.

{signature}

rules.name: support
rules.body_template:
Hi {sender_name},

Thanks for your message. I am sorry you ran into an issue.

Please reply with any screenshots, error messages, or the steps you took before the problem happened, and I will help you troubleshoot it.

{signature}

rules.name: meeting_request
rules.body_template:
Hi {sender_name},

Thanks for your message. I would be happy to coordinate a call.

Please send over a couple of time options that work for you, and I will confirm one of them.

{signature}

rules.name: brochure_request
